perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man (Cai Aga) and a woman (Er Bo) sitting at a white table, shaking hands enthusiastically with exaggerated facial expressions of joy. (2) Cai Aga begins addressing the camera directly, gesturing widely with his hands, while Er Bo listens and nods beside him. (3) The scene transitions to a series of still photographs showing various university student service teams posing together, each photo accompanied by descriptive text. (4) The hosts return to the screen, clapping their hands and displaying the rewards (scholarships and apparel) while maintaining a high-energy interaction.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced background music begins immediately. A male voice speaks in a very high-pitched, excited, and loud tone, with a female voice providing shorter, supportive interjections. (2) The male narrator continues at a high speech density, describing the achievements of different service groups. (3) Sound effects of cheering and clapping are integrated when winners are mentioned. (4) The music maintains its tempo throughout, ending with the hosts speaking in a friendly, conversational manner as the volume fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '恭喜恭喜' (Congratulations) - celebratory hook. (2) '嘎哥連任好里家第二屆理事長' (Aga re-elected as chairman) - decorative text. (3) '入選名單' (Selection list) - functional text. (4) Names of various university clubs like '中國醫藥大學 風浪藥學服務社' - functional text identifying winners. (5) '5萬元的獎助學金' (50,000 TWD scholarship) and '30件的hahababy聯名團服' (30 hahababy uniforms) - functional text detailing prizes.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed announcement with photo slides -> Prize reveal -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main hosts on screen; approximately 100+ students appearing in the 6 group photos shown during the slides.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male character has dyed brown hair and wears a white long-sleeve shirt under denim overalls. The female character has long dark hair with colorful clips and wears a white sweatshirt with a large red flower design.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bright indoor room with a white table in the foreground. Background includes a floor lamp, a small cabinet with a basket, and some indoor plants. Slideshow sections show outdoor campus settings and beaches.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Announcement of Winners -> Prize Summary -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To announce the selected university student service groups for the 'Hao Li Jia' welfare project and reveal the scholarships and custom team uniforms provided as rewards, encouraging social service among youth.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly mentions and displays the 'hahababy' brand as the provider of the team uniforms for the winners.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Cai Aga's signature high-energy and exaggerated hosting style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively combines community service recognition with brand promotion (hahababy) targeting a student demographic.
